evidence.claim: The system allows to register and have a personalized profile including an avatar, nugget balance, earned badges, and a competency radar chart.
evidence.fact: Students can create accounts and customize their profiles by choosing an avatar, and their dashboard displays nugget balance, earned badges, and a competency radar chart.
evidence.user_story_span: register and have a personalized profile including an avatar, nugget balance, earned badges, and a competency radar chart
evidence.fact_span: create accounts and customize their profiles by choosing an avatar, and their dashboard displays nugget balance, earned badges, and a competency radar chart

evidence.fact: The student profile displays a nugget balance.

evidence.claim: they see their avatar, current nugget balance, earned badges, and competency radar chart.
evidence.fact: The student's home screen shows a personalized avatar, current nugget count, all badges they have earned, and a radar chart of their competencies.
evidence.user_story_span: they see their avatar, current nugget balance, earned badges, and competency radar chart
evidence.fact_span: shows a personalized avatar, current nugget count, all badges they have earned, and a radar chart of their competencies

evidence.claim: The user a registered student navigates to their profile.
evidence.fact: After registration, learners set their profile image and can view their nuggets, badges collected, and a radar graph representing their competency strengths.
evidence.user_story_span: a registered student navigates to their profile
evidence.fact_span: After registration, learners set their profile image and can view their nuggets, badges collected, and a radar graph representing their competency strengths

evidence.claim: The user a new user wants to register.
evidence.fact: New learners sign up and personalize their profile with a picture, then see their total nuggets, achievement badges, and a visual radar of their skills.
evidence.user_story_span: a new user wants to register
evidence.fact_span: New learners sign up and personalize their profile with a picture, then see their total nuggets, achievement badges, and a visual radar of their skills

evidence.claim: Avatar can be customized during or after registration.
evidence.fact: After registration, learners set their profile image and can view their nuggets, badges collected, and a radar graph representing their competency strengths.
evidence.user_story_span: Avatar can be customized during or after registration
evidence.fact_span: After registration, learners set their profile image and can view their nuggets, badges collected, and a radar graph representing their competency strengths
